name: io.github.cicicalex/engine
description: Mathematical stability & bias detection engine. Computes AIN (Neutrality Index) across finance, gaming, AI/ML, security, crypto, and text. 63 tools. AIN is a STABILITY measurement only — never prediction or advice. Paired with the zpl-cli companion for out-of-band AI evaluation (no observer effect).

environmentVariables.name: ZPL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: User API key from zeropointlogic.io/dashboard/api-keys. Format: zpl_u_ + 48 hex chars. Service keys (zpl_s_) are rejected since v3.5.0.

environmentVariables.name: ZPL_MODE
environmentVariables.description: pure (default) hides AIN score from the AI on text-evaluation tools to prevent observer effect. coach exposes the score.

environmentVariables.name: ZPL_ENGINE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Engine base URL. Defaults to https://engine.zeropointlogic.io.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Only required for the 8 AI-eval tools (zpl_consistency_test, zpl_sycophancy_score, etc). Session capped at 100 Claude calls per process.
